title: Jelly Belly 15710A 3D Gel Mini Vent Air Freshener Duo Pack-Very Cherry
features: TWO 3D vent mounted Gel air fresheners
The ultimate favourite flavour of all time, the very essence of fresh picked cherries
Designed to be used at the same time
Small bean design for a sleeker, more discreet air freshener
description: From the manufacturer Jelly Belly Car Air Fresheners – There’s Revolution in the Air Bursting with beantastic flavour, Jelly Belly car air fresheners really do smell every bit as good as the beans taste. Jam-packed with tangy top notes and smooth base notes, each perfectly balanced scent captures the essence of the bean for a full-bodied fragrance explosion in your car. The fun doesn’t stop there... echoing the iconic shape of Jelly Belly beans, these air vent car scents look just as fresh and fruity as the real thing, and with more than 20 mouth-watering fragrances in the range, it couldn’t be easier to brighten your day the Jelly Belly way. #BeSeenWithTheBean PERFECTLY BALANCED SCENT ICONIC JELLY BELLY BEAN DESIGN PERFECT FOR YOUR CAR, HOME, OFFICE Jelly Belly Very Cherry Duo Vent Air Freshener Jelly Belly Blueberry 2D Hanging Air Freshener Jelly Belly Blueberry 3D Hanging Air Freshener Jelly Belly Blueberry Gel Can Air Freshener Jelly Belly Tangerine Car Vent Air Freshener Jelly Belly Island Punch Jewel 3D Hanging Air Freshener Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,271 4.2 out of 5 stars 3,131 4.4 out of 5 stars 13,995 4.0 out of 5 stars 808 4.2 out of 5 stars 20 4.6 out of 5 stars 27 Price £4.50 £ 4 . 50 £2.27 £ 2 . 27 £3.50 £ 3 . 50 — no data — no data £3.95 £ 3 . 95 Product Type Duo Air Vent Freshener 2D Jelly Bean Hanging 3D Jelly Bean Hanging Gel Can Air Freshener Spray Air Freshener 3D Jelly Bean Hanging Usage Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Car, Home, Office Quantity Duo Air Fresheners Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Single Air Freshener Long Lasting 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days 30 Days Genuine Jelly Belly ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
